rationale: The citing paper centers on cheap-talk credibility with pooling/separating/semiseparating PBE equilibria, and the cited 2005 paper likewise develops a signaling/PBE model of noncommittal messages with the same equilibrium structure and explicit credibility conditions. This strong theoretical overlap suggests the citation could be a mechanism/theory source rather than a purely incidental mention, even though the raw evidence is only a DOI-level match without local quote context.
